agency_metrics.qualitative_outcome: Users report easier shift transitions and better recovery habits.
Peer-support lead notes improved engagement with short daily prompts.

beta_signups.name: Demo User One
beta_signups.notes: Wants a 14-day beta and a department pilot if staff engagement is strong.

beta_signups.name: Demo User Two
beta_signups.notes: Interested in stress and sleep support; may share with peers.

beta_signups.name: Demo User Three
beta_signups.notes: Open to beta and wants a pilot summary to take to a wellness lead.

briefs.dashboard_note: Elevated stress and short sleep; recommend recovery-focused support.
briefs.suggestion: Take a 10-minute walk, hydrate, and plan a brief peer check-in.
briefs.summary: The day is demanding; the goal is recovery, not optimization.

briefs.dashboard_note: Stable state; light challenge is appropriate.
briefs.suggestion: Do one focused work block, then stop and reset.
briefs.summary: The current state supports a light flow block.
